usp.title: Gut-Friendly Goodness
usp.tagline: Support your microbiome, sip by sip
usp.description: Infused with prebiotics and 1 billion live probiotics, Bubblix is designed to support a balanced gut. Each sparkling sip helps nourish your microbiome while keeping things light, refreshing, and easy to enjoy daily.
usp.alt: Minimal 3D glass bottle with glowing probiotic bubbles inside

usp.title: Light Calories, Big Flavor
usp.description: At just 20 calories per can, Bubblix delivers a full burst of fruity flavor without weighing you down. It’s the perfect balance of indulgence and mindful refreshment.
usp.alt: Dynamic fruit splash with light sparkling soda effect

usp.title: Naturally Refreshing
usp.description: Made with naturally sourced ingredients and no artificial sweeteners or flavors, Bubblix keeps it clean. Just pure, crisp refreshment that feels as good as it tastes.
usp.alt: Minimal eco-inspired soda visual with soft green tones
